Nahid Rana starred with 5/24, while Bangladesh chased 115 in 15.1 overs, with Tanzid Hasan hitting an unbeaten 67.

description: The Indian LPG system is designed for operational flow, not stockpiling. And there are no concrete proposals currently to increase large underground storage either. The International Energy Agency (IEA) has flagged the lack of such storage as an infrastructural weakness in India.

description: Amazon is implementing new coding rules for engineers following recent outages, some linked to AI tools. A 90-day safety reset for "Tier-1 systems" mandates dual reviews for code changes, mandatory use of Modeled Change Management, and adherence to reliability standards. This response aims to prevent further order-impacting incidents.

India prepares for its biggest headcount: What makes Census 2027 different
description: India gears up for Census 2027, a comprehensive, paper-free digital headcount after a decade-long delay. This exercise will include caste enumeration for the first time since 1931 and will be crucial for Lok Sabha delimitation, potentially impacting women's reservation. The digital approach aims for efficiency and transparency.

title: Investor blames Nvidia's 'mafia-like' behaviour for Sam Altman walking out of datacentre deal
description: Michael Burry, famed for predicting the 2008 crash, accuses Nvidia of 'mafia-like' tactics, alleging it blocked AMD from a major Oracle AI deal. He claims Nvidia's dominance forced OpenAI to abandon Oracle's data center plans, as chips would be outdated. The US Justice Department is reportedly investigating Nvidia's conduct.

title: USCIS issues 'alert', shares details of the form it will reject starting April 1
description: USCIS has updated Form I-129, effective April 1, 2026, requiring employers to detail educational and experience requirements for H-1B visa applicants. This change aims to align with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments and verify consistency between the Labor Condition Application and the registration process, impacting the upcoming FY27 H1B cap season.

title: Earth’s magnetic flips can last 70,000 years, new study finds
description: A weak field for 70,000 years could have exposed the atmosphere and surface life to significantly more solar radiation for a prolonged period

title: Groups to prevent human-elephant conflict linked to more elephant deaths
description: Anti-depredation squads were formed in villages to incentivise communities to join hands with the Forest Department to respond to elephants together. However, the searchlights and firecrackers the squads used to drive elephants away possibly created a ‘landscape of fear’, forcing elephants to stray into more dangerous situations
